name: Best GoHighLevel Alternative: For Growing Agencies
hero_main_title: An agency operating system that helps you resell marketing products/services , automate workflows, and generate high-quality leads
hero_summary: Tired of confusing setup & breaking tech? Synup gives you a 'high level' agency operating system that’s built for scale: true white-labeling, lead generation, automated workflows, and all in one platform. ✅ CRM & Sales Pipeline ✅ White-Label Branding & Portals ✅ Listings + Local SEO + Reputation Tools ✅ Task & Document Hub ✅ AI Automations
counter_text_1: Agencies powered by Synup's agency operating system
counter_text_3: Less client churn with predictive analytics & client health metrics
section_2_heading: Switch to Synup for Simpler Workflows & More Robust Platform
section_2_summary: GoHighLevel gives agencies a lot: funnels, funnels, automations: but customers routinely report a steep learning curve, flaky automations, and hit-or-miss support that costs time and client trust. Synup OS was designed to remove those exact frictions: no setup headaches, no broken automations, and a white-label experience your clients actually see as yours.
section_2_slider_1_heading: Superior Agency OS. Not Another Frankenstack.
section_2_slider_1_summary: __POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__Stop stitching funnels, CRMs and local tools together. Synup is a better gohighlevel alternative that unifies leads, sales, onboarding, delivery, billing and reporting in one OS so your team spends less time switching tools and more time growing accounts. (One platform for the entire client lifecycle.)
section_2_slider_2_summary: __POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__GHL has disintegrated tools & automation, but Synup’s suite + reselling is structured to let agencies add them under own brand with streamlined operations. This includes white-label listings, reputation, social media, SEO automation, and more apps.
section_2_slider_3_heading: Advanced Automation + AI Agent That Work Out of the Box
section_2_step_3_summary: __POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__No need to build endless workflows from scratch, Synup bakes AI and advanced automation directly into your daily tasks: sales outreach automation, client research automation, review responses automation, social content suggestions, & more. Less setup, less guesswork, and more impact for your clients
section_2_slider_4_summary: __POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__A big GHL complaint? It feels like 20 tools crammed into one with patchwork automation. Synup’s UI is built for efficiency: one login, intuitive navigation, and client health metrics surfaced automatically.
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO HELP AGENCIES GROW & REDUCE CLIENT CHURN
why_choose_tab_desc_1: GHL focuses heavily on sales funnels but leaves retention to agencies. Synup's tool bakes in churn forecasting, sales funnel, client health scores, and retention alerts so agencies can proactively act before losing clients. It’s not just about closing deals, it’s about keeping them.
why_choose_tab_title_2: Streamlined Client Management for Scaling Agencies
why_choose_tab_desc_2: __POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__GHL struggles when agencies handle 50, 100, or 500+ client accounts. Synup's tool is purpose-built for multi-location, multi-client scalability with custom roles, permissions, and bulk workflows.
why_choose_tab_desc_3: __POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__GoHighLevel often feels like 20 different tools stitched together, with steep learning curves and confusing workflows. Synup gives your marketing agency the same depth: CRM, client management, sales, billing and tools like listings, reputation, social, SEO. But with a clean, intuitive interface.
why_choose_content_summary: __POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__Run your agency from a single platform: sales, onboarding, execution, email campaigns, billing, project management, and reporting. No more juggling 10+ tools.
testimonial_summary: __POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__Elevate your client experience with a fully branded portal, custom domain, and white-label dashboards & reports. Resell full marketing product suites under your branding, unlocking recurring revenue without development costs.
customer_review_1_name: Kristen Dillon - VP of Operations, Zoek
customer_review_1_summary: What set Synup apart from all other places we looked is their dedication to their customers and their clients. It feels like a relationship, they’re really there to help you.
customer_review_2_summary: Most businesses don’t realize this, but getting these little things right is a leg up against the competition. The Synup platform gives us the ability to hone our attention to detail, helping our clients perform against the competition.
